findings.summary: 3 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #root > div > div:nth-of-type(1) > ul > li:nth-of-type(1) > a (contrast 1.46), #root > div > div:nth-of-type(1) > ul > li:nth-of-type(2) > a (contrast 1.42), #root > div > div:nth-of-type(1) > ul > li:nth-of-type(3) > a (contrast 1.45)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.

findings.summary: 1 heading level skip(s) on http://127.0.0.1:8777/dashboard-heading-inconsistency.html (jumping past one or more levels): heading, Total Users, level 3
findings.persona_impact: A screen-reader user navigating by heading level loses the document outline and may miss sections.
